heading: General elections; time; transfer of Council functions, property, etc.
label: 1576 General elections; time; transfer of Council functions, property, etc.
text: The next general election in the Virgin Islands shall be held on . At such time there shall be chosen the entire membership of the legislature as herein provided. Thereafter the general elections shall be held on the first Tuesday after the first Monday in November, beginning with the year 1956, and every two years thereafter. The Municipal Council of Saint Thomas and Saint John, and the Municipal Council of Saint Croix, existing on , shall continue to function until , at which time all of the functions, property, personnel, records, and unexpended balances of appropriations and funds of the governments of the municipality of Saint Thomas and Saint John and the municipality of Saint Croix shall be transferred to the government of the Virgin Islands.November 2, 1954July 22, 1954January 10, 1955
